title: Anniversary House Tiflair Polka Dot Lunch Napkins Light Blue 3 ply
features: Good quality napkins are made of 3-ply tissue for extra durability and absorption
Premium flexographic printing and certified water based inks
Use to match a party theme or to liven up any celebration table!
description: Product Description Liven up any celebration table with these luxury Ti-flair brand lunch napkins. 3-ply thickness, water-based inks, and attractive premium prints make these some of the most high-quality paper napkins in the marketplace. Product and packaging is fully recyclable. Safety Warning Due to the nature of this product, colour may transfer.
